items.title: You have to think of tokenmaxxing as eating crab legs at the buffet. The buffet (all you can eat AI plans) is not going to last forever so you better eat all the crab legs while you still can.
items.title_original: You have to think of tokenmaxxing as eating crab legs at the buffet. The buffet (all you can eat AI plans) is not going to last forever so you better eat all the crab legs while you still can.
items.title_en: You have to think of tokenmaxxing as eating crab legs at the buffet. The buffet (all you can eat AI plans) is not going to last forever so you better eat all the crab legs while you still can.
items.title_zh: 你必须把代币最大化想象成在自助餐上吃蟹腿。自助餐（人工智能计划）不会永远持续下去，所以你最好趁还能吃的时候吃掉所有的蟹腿。
items.title_bilingual: 你必须把代币最大化想象成在自助餐上吃蟹腿。自助餐（人工智能计划）不会永远持续下去，所以你最好趁还能吃的时候吃掉所有的蟹腿。 / You have to think of tokenmaxxing as eating crab legs at the buffet. The buffet (all you can eat AI plans) is not going to last forever so you better eat all the crab legs while you still can.
